title: Aazhimala Shiva Temple
tagline: Aazhimala Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Aazhimala Shiva Temple is a Hindu temple located on the coast of the Arabian Sea near Vizhinjam in the Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Aazhimala Shiva Temple is a Hindu temple located on the coast of the Arabian Sea near Vizhinjam in the Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, India. Dedicated to Shiva, the temple is known for the 18 m (58 ft) tall Gangadhareshwara sculpture, which is the tallest Shiva sculpture in Kerala. The temple is built in a style resembling the architecture of Tamil Nadu. It is governed by the Aazhimala Shiva Temple Devaswom Trust.

topPlaces.name: Vizhinjam International Seaport Thiruvananthapuram
topPlaces.description: Vizhinjam International Seaport Thiruvananthapuram ( , VIZ-in-jam ... TIR-uu-və-nə-TAH-puurr-əm) also known as Trivandrum Port (IN TRV 01) is India's first deep-water transshipment port.

topPlaces.name: Kottukal
topPlaces.description: Kottukal is a village in the taluk of Neyyattinkara, Thiruvananthapuram district, in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pulluvila
topPlaces.description: Pulluvila is a village between Kovalam and Poovar in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala state, India. It is hardly 7 km (4.3 mi) away from the Vizhinjam Port.

topPlaces.name: Vizhinjam
topPlaces.description: Vizhinjam (Malayalam: [ʋiɻiɲːɐm]) is an area located in the city of Thiruvananthapuram, the capital city of the state of Kerala in India. which belongs to Thiruvananthapuram Corporation .

topPlaces.name: Vilavancode taluk
topPlaces.description: Vilavancode taluk is a taluk located in Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, India. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Vilavancode.

topPlaces.name: Kanjiramkulam
topPlaces.description: Kanjiramkulam is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala State, India and is located on Thiruvananthapuram – Kanyakumari NH 66 bypass. It is located 4.5 km from Neyyattinkara town and 22 km from the Kerala State capital Thiruvananthapuram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aazhimala Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aazhimala Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aazhimala Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (16 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aazhimala Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aazhimala Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aazhimala Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Aazhimala Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aazhimala Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adimalathura, Vizhinjam International Seaport Thiruvananthapuram, Kottukal, Pulluvila, Vizhinjam.
